description: ol-style-name-case (issue #115): a structural keyword written non-lowercase (`REPEAT`) is flagged the same way a non-lowercase primitive/user identifier is (`spec/style-guide.md` "Keywords are lowercase"). Only the opening keyword's own span is reported (`params.name` carries its literal source spelling); the closing `end repeat` is already lowercase here and is out of scope for this slice regardless (no AST field records a block's closing keyword spelling).
